parameters.name: -color_map
parameters.desc: Returns the color map mode (default full palette or grayscale).

parameters.name: -frame_width
parameters.desc: Returns the frame width in pixels.

parameters.name: -keep_aspect_ratio
parameters.desc: Returns whether the aspect ratio is maintained (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -path_depth
parameters.desc: Returns the number of path directory names displayed in the title.

parameters.name: -ratio_xtoy
parameters.desc: Returns the x-to-y axis ratio (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Returns whether the plot is displayed.

parameters.name: -show_axes
parameters.desc: Returns whether the axes are displayed.

parameters.name: -show_axes_label
parameters.desc: Returns whether axes labels are displayed (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -show_axes_title
parameters.desc: Returns whether axes titles are displayed (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -show_cube_axes
parameters.desc: Returns whether cube axes are displayed (3D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_curve_lines
parameters.desc: Returns whether curve lines are displayed (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -show_curve_markers
parameters.desc: Returns whether curve markers are displayed (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -show_grid
parameters.desc: Returns whether the grid is displayed (xy and 2D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_legend
parameters.desc: Returns whether the legend is displayed.

parameters.name: -show_major_ticks
parameters.desc: Returns whether major ticks are displayed (3D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_max_marker
parameters.desc: Returns whether the maximum marker is displayed (2D and 3D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_min_marker
parameters.desc: Returns whether the minimum marker is displayed (2D and 3D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_minor_ticks
parameters.desc: Returns whether minor ticks are displayed (3D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_path
parameters.desc: Returns whether the path is displayed in the title.

parameters.name: -show_regions_bg
parameters.desc: Returns whether region background colors are displayed.

parameters.name: -show_title
parameters.desc: Returns whether the title is displayed.

parameters.name: -tdr_state
parameters.desc: Returns the name of the currently displayed TDR state.

parameters.name: -tdr_state_index
parameters.desc: Returns the index of the currently displayed TDR state.

parameters.name: -title
parameters.desc: Returns the plot title text.

parameters.name: -title_font_att
parameters.desc: Returns the title font attribute (normal, bold, italic, underline, or strikeout).

parameters.name: -title_font_color
parameters.desc: Returns the title font color.

parameters.name: -title_font_factor
parameters.desc: Returns the title font size factor (2D and 3D plots only).

parameters.name: -title_font_family
parameters.desc: Returns the title font family (arial, courier, or times).

parameters.name: -title_font_size
parameters.desc: Returns the title font size (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -transformation
parameters.desc: Returns the current transformation (3D plots only).

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. If not specified, uses the selected plot.

create_curve.description: Creates a new curve for an xy plot from dataset variables or a formula. If -plot is not specified, the curve is drawn on the selected xy plot. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: List of dataset names from which to extract data. Mutually exclusive with -function.

parameters.name: -function
parameters.desc: Formula from which to create a curve. Mutually exclusive with -dataset.

parameters.name: -axisX
parameters.desc: Variable to be used for the x-axis.

parameters.name: -axisY
parameters.desc: Variable to be used for the left y-axis.

parameters.name: -axisY2
parameters.desc: Variable to be used for the right y2-axis.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the new curve. If not specified, a default name is assigned.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot where the curve will be displayed. Defaults to the selected xy plot.

parameters.name: -y
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies which axis the function targets: 1 for y-axis, 2 for y2-axis. Only works with -function.

list_curves.description: Returns a list of curve names from the specified or selected xy plot. Supports filtering by search pattern, selection state, and visibility.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter curve names.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to search. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -selected
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns only curves that are currently selected.

parameters.name: -not_selected
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns only curves that are not selected.

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns only visible curves.

parameters.name: -hide
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns only hidden curves.

remove_curves.description: Removes the specified curves from an xy plot.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: List of curve names to remove.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which to remove curves. Defaults to the active plot.

set_curve_prop.signature: set_curve_prop <stringList> [-axis left | right] [-color <#rrggbb>] [-deriv <intValue> | -integ] [-function <stringValue>] [-label <stringValue>] [-line_style solid | dot | dash | dashdot | dashdotdot] [-line_width <intValue>] [-markers_size <intValue>] [-markers_type circle | circlef | square | squaref | diamond | diamondf | cross | plus] [-plot <stringValue>] [-reset] [-show | -hide] [-show_legend | -hide_legend] [-show_line | -hide_line] [-show_markers | -hide_markers] [-xScale <doubleValue>] [-xShift <doubleValue>] [-yScale <doubleValue>] [-yShift <doubleValue>]
set_curve_prop.description: Sets visual and mathematical properties for the specified curves on an xy plot, including line style, markers, axis alignment, derivation, integration, and scaling. Does not apply to discrete traps.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: List of curve names on which to apply properties.

parameters.name: -axis
parameters.desc: Optional. Aligns the curve to the left or right y-axis. Values: left, right.

parameters.name: -color
parameters.desc: Optional. Color of the curve line in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -deriv
parameters.desc: Optional. Computes the derivative of the curve with the specified order (1 for first derivative, 2 for second).

parameters.name: -integ
parameters.desc: Optional. Computes the integral of the curve.

parameters.name: -function
parameters.desc: Optional. Applies a mathematical function to the curve. See Appendix D of the manual for available functions.

parameters.name: -label
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets a custom label for the curve displayed in the legend.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Style of the curve line. Values: solid (continuous), dot (dotted), dash (dashed), dashdot (alternating dash and dot), dashdotdot (alternating dash and two dots).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Width of the curve line in pixels.

parameters.name: -markers_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Size of the data point markers.

parameters.name: -markers_type
parameters.desc: Optional. Shape of the data point markers. Values: circle (hollow circle), circlef (filled circle), square (hollow square), squaref (filled square), diamond (hollow diamond), diamondf (filled diamond), cross (crosshair), plus (plus sign).

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -reset
parameters.desc: Optional. Resets all curve properties to their default values.

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Optional. Makes the curve visible.

parameters.name: -hide
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the curve from the plot.

parameters.name: -show_legend
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the curve title in the legend.

parameters.name: -hide_legend
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the curve title from the legend.

parameters.name: -show_line
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the curve line.

parameters.name: -hide_line
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the curve line, displaying only markers.

parameters.name: -show_markers
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows data point markers on the curve.

parameters.name: -hide_markers
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides data point markers.

parameters.name: -xScale
parameters.desc: Optional. Scaling factor applied to the x-axis values of the curve.

parameters.name: -xShift
parameters.desc: Optional. Offset value added to the x-axis values of the curve.

parameters.name: -yScale
parameters.desc: Optional. Scaling factor applied to the y-axis values of the curve.

parameters.name: -yShift
parameters.desc: Optional. Offset value added to the y-axis values of the curve.

set_curve_prop.example: set_curve_prop Curve_1 -label "NetActive Field (Cut from structure_1 at x=0)"

get_curve_prop.description: Returns a single property of the specified curve at a time. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Identifier of the curve to query.

parameters.name: -axis
parameters.desc: Returns the axis alignment of the curve (left or right).

parameters.name: -color
parameters.desc: Returns the curve line color in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -deriv
parameters.desc: Returns the order of the derivative applied to the curve.

parameters.name: -function
parameters.desc: Returns the function applied to the curve.

parameters.name: -integ
parameters.desc: Returns the integration applied to the curve.

parameters.name: -label
parameters.desc: Returns the curve label text.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Returns the line style of the curve.

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Returns the line width of the curve.

parameters.name: -markers_size
parameters.desc: Returns the markers size of the curve.

parameters.name: -markers_type
parameters.desc: Returns the markers type of the curve.

parameters.name: -selected
parameters.desc: Returns whether the curve is selected.

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Returns whether the curve is visible.

parameters.name: -xScale
parameters.desc: Returns the x-axis scale factor of the curve.

parameters.name: -xShift
parameters.desc: Returns the x-axis shift value of the curve.

parameters.name: -yScale
parameters.desc: Returns the y-axis scale factor of the curve.

parameters.name: -yShift
parameters.desc: Returns the y-axis shift value of the curve.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

probe_curve.description: Probes a curve at a specified x, y, or y2 value using interpolation matching the axis scale (linear or logarithmic). Returns the corresponding value on the other axis. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Identifier of the curve to probe.

parameters.name: -valueX
parameters.desc: Probes the curve at the specified x value and returns the corresponding y value.

parameters.name: -valueY
parameters.desc: Probes the curve at the specified y value and returns the corresponding x value.

parameters.name: -valueY2
parameters.desc: Probes the curve at the specified y2 value and returns the corresponding x value.

parameters.name: -extrapolate
parameters.desc: Optional. Allows the probe to extrapolate values beyond the curve data range.

parameters.name: -snap
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns the closest data point on the curve instead of interpolated values.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the curve. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -position
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns the position (coordinates) of the probed point.

parameters.name: -scalar
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns the scalar value at the probed point.

get_curve_data.description: Returns all data values from the specified axis of a curve.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the curve from which to retrieve data.

parameters.name: -axisX
parameters.desc: Returns all x-axis data values of the curve.

parameters.name: -axisY
parameters.desc: Returns all y-axis data values of the curve.

parameters.name: -scalar
parameters.desc: Returns all scalar values of the curve.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot where the curve is displayed.

export_curves.description: Exports curves from a plot to a file in CSV or PLX format.

parameters.name: -filename
parameters.desc: Name of the exported file.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Name of the plot whose curves will be exported.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: Optional. List of specific curve names to export. If not specified, all curves are exported.

parameters.name: -format
parameters.desc: Optional. Output file format. Values: csv (comma-separated values, default), plx (Sentaurus plot format).

parameters.name: -overwrite
parameters.desc: Optional. Overwrites existing files if they already exist.

draw_line.description: Draws a line connecting two points on an xy or 2D plot. Returns the name of the created line object, which is numbered automatically if other lines already exist.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the start point of the line.

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the end point of the line.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot where the line will be drawn. Defaults to the selected plot.

draw_rectangle.description: Draws a rectangle on an xy or 2D plot defined by two corner points. Returns the name of the created rectangle object.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the first corner (upper-left in xy plots, lower-left in 2D plots).

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the second corner (lower-right in xy plots, upper-right in 2D plots).

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot where the rectangle will be drawn. Defaults to the selected plot.

draw_ellipse.description: Draws an ellipse inscribed within an invisible bounding rectangle defined by two corner points. The rectangle itself is not drawn. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the upper-left corner of the bounding rectangle.

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the lower-right corner of the bounding rectangle.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot where the ellipse will be drawn. Defaults to the selected plot.

draw_textbox.description: Draws a text box with a label at the specified position, optionally with an arrow pointing to an anchor position. Applies to xy and 2D plots. The arrow and its properties work only in 2D plots.

parameters.name: -at
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the lower-right corner of the text box.

parameters.name: -label
parameters.desc: Text to be displayed inside the text box.

parameters.name: -anchor
parameters.desc: Optional. Coordinates where the arrow points to (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot where the text box will be drawn. Defaults to the selected plot.

list_lines.description: Returns a list of line names matching the search pattern. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter line names. If not specified, all lines are returned.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to search. Defaults to the selected plot.

list_rectangles.description: Returns a list of rectangle names matching the search pattern. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter rectangle names. If not specified, all rectangles are returned.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to search. Defaults to the selected plot.

list_ellipses.description: Returns a list of ellipse names matching the search pattern. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter ellipse names. If not specified, all ellipses are returned.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to search. Defaults to the selected plot.

list_textboxes.description: Returns a list of text box names matching the search pattern. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter text box names. If not specified, all text boxes are returned.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to search. Defaults to the selected plot.

set_line_prop.signature: set_line_prop <stringValue> [-line_color <#rrggbb>] [-line_style solid | dot | dash | dashdot | dashdotdot] [-line_width <intValue>] [-p1 <doubleList>] [-p2 <doubleList>] [-plot <stringValue>]
set_line_prop.description: Sets the visual properties of a line, including color, style, width, and endpoint positions. The line style option applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the line to modify.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Color of the line in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Style of the line (xy plots only). Values: solid (continuous), dot (dotted), dash (dashed), dashdot (alternating dash and dot), dashdotdot (alternating dash and two dots).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Width of the line in pixels.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Optional. New start point coordinates of the line.

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Optional. New end point coordinates of the line.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the line. Defaults to the selected plot.

get_line_prop.description: Returns a single property of the specified line. Applies to xy and 2D plots only. Returns only one property at a time.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the line to query.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Returns the line color in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Returns the line pattern (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Returns the line width in pixels.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Returns the start point coordinates of the line.

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Returns the end point coordinates of the line.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the line. Defaults to the selected plot.

set_rectangle_prop.signature: set_rectangle_prop <stringValue> [-fill_color <#rrggbb>] [-line_color <#rrggbb>] [-line_style solid | dot | dash | dashdot | dashdotdot] [-line_width <intValue>] [-p1 <doubleList>] [-p2 <doubleList>] [-plot <stringValue>]
set_rectangle_prop.description: Sets the visual properties of a rectangle, including fill color, line color, style, width, and corner positions. The fill color and line style options apply to xy plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the rectangle to modify.

parameters.name: -fill_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Fill color of the rectangle in #rrggbb format. Default is transparent (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Border line color of the rectangle in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Border line style (xy plots only). Values: solid (continuous), dot (dotted), dash (dashed), dashdot (alternating dash and dot), dashdotdot (alternating dash and two dots).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Border line width in pixels.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Optional. New coordinates of the first corner (upper-left in xy plots, lower-left in 2D plots).

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Optional. New coordinates of the second corner (lower-right in xy plots, upper-right in 2D plots).

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the rectangle. Defaults to the selected plot.

get_rectangle_prop.description: Returns a single property of the specified rectangle. Applies to xy and 2D plots only. Returns only one property at a time.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the rectangle to query.

parameters.name: -fill_color
parameters.desc: Returns the interior fill color of the rectangle.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Returns the border line color of the rectangle.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Returns the border line pattern of the rectangle.

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Returns the border line width in pixels.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Returns the first corner coordinates (upper-left in xy plots, lower-left in 2D plots).

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Returns the second corner coordinates (lower-right in xy plots, upper-right in 2D plots).

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the rectangle. Defaults to the selected plot.

set_ellipse_prop.signature: set_ellipse_prop <stringValue> [-fill_color <#rrggbb>] [-line_color <#rrggbb>] [-line_style solid | dot | dash | dashdot | dashdotdot] [-line_width <intValue>] [-p1 <doubleList>] [-p2 <doubleList>] [-plot <stringValue>]
set_ellipse_prop.description: Sets the visual properties of an ellipse, including fill color, line color, style, width, and bounding rectangle corners. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the ellipse to modify.

parameters.name: -fill_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Fill color of the ellipse in #rrggbb format. Default is transparent.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Border line color of the ellipse in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Border line style. Values: solid (continuous), dot (dotted), dash (dashed), dashdot (alternating dash and dot), dashdotdot (alternating dash and two dots).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Border line width in pixels.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Optional. New upper-left corner of the bounding rectangle.

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Optional. New lower-right corner of the bounding rectangle.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the ellipse. Defaults to the selected plot.

get_ellipse_prop.description: Returns a single property of the specified ellipse. Applies to xy plots only. Returns only one property at a time.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the ellipse to query.

parameters.name: -fill_color
parameters.desc: Returns the interior fill color of the ellipse.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Returns the border line color of the ellipse.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Returns the border line pattern of the ellipse.

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Returns the border line width in pixels.

parameters.name: -p1
parameters.desc: Returns the upper-left corner coordinates of the bounding rectangle.

parameters.name: -p2
parameters.desc: Returns the lower-right corner coordinates of the bounding rectangle.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the ellipse. Defaults to the selected plot.

set_textbox_prop.signature: set_textbox_prop <stringValue> [-anchor_pos {<x> <y>}] [-arrow_size <intValue>] [-font_att normal | bold | italic | underline | strikeout] [-font_color <#rrggbb>] [-font_factor <doubleValue>] [-font_family arial | courier | times] [-font_size <intValue>] [-line_color <#rrggbb>] [-line_style solid | dot | dash | dashdot | dashdotdot] [-line_width <intValue>] [-plot <stringValue>] [-pos {<x> <y>}] [-rotation <intValue>] [-show_anchor | -hide_anchor] [-show_border | -hide_border] [-text <stringValue>]
set_textbox_prop.description: Sets visual properties of a text box, including font attributes, colors, position, rotation, anchor arrow, and border. Font size applies to xy plots; font factor, anchor, and border apply to 2D plots.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the text box to modify.

parameters.name: -anchor_pos
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the anchor position in world coordinates (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -arrow_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the arrow size (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -font_att
parameters.desc: Optional. Font attribute. Values: normal, bold, italic, underline, strikeout. Multiple attributes can be combined, e.g., {bold italic}.

parameters.name: -font_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Text font color in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -font_factor
parameters.desc: Optional. Multiplier for the text font size (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -font_family
parameters.desc: Optional. Font family. Values: arial, courier, times.

parameters.name: -font_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Font size in points (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Line and arrow color in #rrggbb format (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Line style (2D plots only). Values: solid (continuous), dot (dotted), dash (dashed), dashdot (alternating dash and dot), dashdotdot (alternating dash and two dots).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Width of the text box border and anchor line in pixels (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the text box. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -pos
parameters.desc: Optional. Lower-left corner position. In xy plots, uses world coordinates {x, y}; in 2D plots, uses normalized screen coordinates (0.0 to 1.0).

parameters.name: -rotation
parameters.desc: Optional. Rotation angle of the text box in degrees (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -show_anchor
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the anchor arrow (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -hide_anchor
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the anchor arrow (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_border
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the text box border (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -hide_border
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the text box border (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -text
parameters.desc: Optional. New text content displayed in the text box.

get_textbox_prop.description: Returns a single property of the specified text box. Applies to xy and 2D plots only. Some properties are plot-type specific.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Name of the text box to query.

parameters.name: -anchor_pos
parameters.desc: Returns the anchor position in world coordinates (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -arrow_size
parameters.desc: Returns the arrow size (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -font_att
parameters.desc: Returns the font attribute of the text.

parameters.name: -font_color
parameters.desc: Returns the text font color.

parameters.name: -font_factor
parameters.desc: Returns the font size multiplier (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -font_family
parameters.desc: Returns the font family.

parameters.name: -font_size
parameters.desc: Returns the font size in points (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Returns the line and arrow color (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Returns the line style (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Returns the line width in pixels (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -pos
parameters.desc: Returns the lower-left corner position of the text box.

parameters.name: -rotation
parameters.desc: Returns the rotation angle in degrees (xy plots only).

parameters.name: -show_anchor
parameters.desc: Returns whether the anchor is shown (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -show_border
parameters.desc: Returns whether the border is shown (2D plots only).

parameters.name: -text
parameters.desc: Returns the text content of the text box.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot containing the text box. Defaults to the selected plot.

remove_lines.description: Removes the specified lines from a plot. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: List of line names to remove.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which to remove lines. Defaults to the selected plot.

remove_rectangles.description: Removes the specified rectangles from a plot. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: List of rectangle names to remove.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which to remove rectangles. Defaults to the selected plot.

remove_ellipses.description: Removes the specified ellipses from a plot. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: List of ellipse names to remove.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which to remove ellipses. Defaults to the selected plot.

remove_textboxes.description: Removes the specified text boxes from a plot. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: List of text box names to remove.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which to remove text boxes. Defaults to the selected plot.

create_cutplane.description: Creates a new cutplane from a 3D plot. The new plot has the name of the cutplane. If -plot or -dataset is not specified, the command uses the selected 3D plot dataset. Applies to 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -type
parameters.desc: Selects the axis from which the cutplane is generated: "x", "y", or "z" for axis-aligned planes, "free" for an arbitrary plane defined by origin and normal.

parameters.name: -at
parameters.desc: Cuts the structure at the value specified in the axis defined by -type. Must not be used with -type free.

parameters.name: -origin
parameters.desc: Optional. Origin point {x y z} of the cutting plane. Must be used with -type free and -normal.

parameters.name: -normal
parameters.desc: Optional. Normal vector {x y z} of the cutting plane. Must be used with -type free and -origin.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset from which the cutplane is generated.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which the cutplane is generated.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the new cutplane dataset. If not specified, a default name is generated based on the original 3D dataset.

create_cutline.signature: create_cutline -type x | y | z | free [-at <doubleValue>] [-axisX x | y | z [-surface]] [-points {<x1> <y1> [<z1>] <x2> <y2> [<z2>]}] [-dataset <stringValue> | -plot <stringValue>] [-materials <stringList> | -regions <stringList>] [-name <stringValue>]
create_cutline.description: Creates a new cutline (outline) from a 2D or 3D plot. For axis-aligned cutlines, -type and -at are required. For free cutlines, -type free and -points are required. The new plot has the same name as the cutline dataset with the prefix Plot_.

parameters.name: -type
parameters.desc: Selects the axis to which the cutline is aligned: "x", "y", or "z" for axis-aligned, "free" for a line between two arbitrary points.

parameters.name: -at
parameters.desc: Required when -type is x, y, or z. Specifies the coordinate value along the selected axis where the cutline is placed.

parameters.name: -axisX
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the reference axis against which curves are displayed when extracting 3D PMC surface data.

parameters.name: -surface
parameters.desc: Optional. Extracts surface data as a 1D dataset from 3D PMC structures.

parameters.name: -points
parameters.desc: Required when -type is free. Two endpoint coordinates defining the cutline: {x1 y1 [z1] x2 y2 [z2]}. In 2D plots, z values can be omitted.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset from which the cutline is generated.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which the cutline is generated.

parameters.name: -materials
parameters.desc: Optional. If specified, the cutline operation is performed only on the listed materials.

parameters.name: -regions
parameters.desc: Optional. If specified, the cutline operation is performed only on the listed regions.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the new cutline dataset. If not specified, a default name is generated.

create_cutpolyline.description: Creates a new cutline with the specified number of vertex points on a 2D plot. The polyline passes through each specified point in order. Applies to 2D plots only.

parameters.name: -points
parameters.desc: Required. Vertices through which the cutline will pass, defined as {"x0 y0" "x1 y1" ...}.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset from which the cutline is created.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which the cutline is created.

parameters.name: -materials
parameters.desc: Optional. If specified, the cutline operation is performed only on the listed materials.

parameters.name: -regions
parameters.desc: Optional. If specified, the cutline operation is performed only on the listed regions.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the new cutline dataset.

create_cut_boundary.description: Creates a cutline along the specified structure boundary. The command produces line segments that define the cutline, where a vertex is a point defining a region. Applies to 2D plots and free cutplanes only.

parameters.name: -materials
parameters.desc: Required (use with -regions). Materials to which the boundary belongs.

parameters.name: -regions
parameters.desc: Required (use with -materials). Regions to which the boundary belongs.

parameters.name: -points
parameters.desc: Required. Vertices on the boundary through which the cutline will pass, defined as {"x0 y0 [z0]" "x1 y1 [z1]" ...}.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the dataset from which to retrieve regions or materials.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the plot from which to retrieve regions or materials.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the cutline dataset.

parameters.name: -reverse
parameters.desc: Optional. Reverses the direction of the cutline creation.

parameters.name: -segments
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the regions from which data is extracted in each segment line. The list length must equal the number of vertices minus 1.

create_projection.signature: create_projection -field <stringValue> -function max | min -type x | y | z | free [-dataset <stringValue> | -plot <stringValue>] [-geom <stringValue>] [-name <stringValue>] [-normal <doubleList> | -materials <stringList> | -regions <stringList> | -window {<x1> <y1> [<z1>] <x2> <y2> [<z2>]}] [-origin <doubleList>] [-resolution <x>x<y>x<z>] [-width <doubleValue>]
create_projection.description: Creates a 2D plot with maximum or minimum values along a 3D plot axis. Higher -resolution values increase precision but also calculation time. Applies to 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -field
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the field to be projected.

parameters.name: -function
parameters.desc: Required. Specifies the projection function: "max" for maximum values or "min" for minimum values.

parameters.name: -type
parameters.desc: Required. Specifies the axis to be projected: "x" projects a 2D yz plot, "y" projects a 2D xz plot, "z" projects a 2D xy plot, "free" projects using an arbitrary plane.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset from which to project.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which to project.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Geometry that has the given field. Defaults to the first shown geometry from the selected dataset.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the resultant 2D projection plot.

parameters.name: -normal
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the normal vector for the plane when -type is free. Must contain three values, which will be normalized if required.

parameters.name: -materials
parameters.desc: Optional. Limits the projection to the specified materials.

parameters.name: -regions
parameters.desc: Optional. Limits the projection to the specified regions.

parameters.name: -window
parameters.desc: Optional. Limits the projection to all regions inside the specified bounding box {xmin ymin [zmin] xmax ymax [zmax]}.

parameters.name: -origin
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the origin for the plane when -type is free.

parameters.name: -resolution
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the resolution of the search algorithm as <x>x<y>x<z>. Default is 50x50x50.

parameters.name: -width
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the width of the domain considered for free projection types.

list_cutplanes.description: Returns a list of cutplane names. If no arguments are specified, all cutplanes are returned. Applies to 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter cutplane names.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches on a specific plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -type
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by cutplane type: "x", "y", "z", or "free".

list_cutlines.description: Returns a list of cutline names. If no arguments are specified, all cutlines are returned. Applies to 2D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter cutline names.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches on a specific plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -type
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by cutline type: "x", "y", "z", or "free".

remove_cutplanes.description: Removes the specified cutplanes from a plot.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: Required. List of cutplane names to remove.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which the cutplanes will be removed.

remove_cutlines.description: Removes the specified cutlines from a plot.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: Required. List of cutline names to remove.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which the cutlines will be removed. Defaults to the active plot.

set_cutplane_prop.description: Changes the properties of a cutplane, including its position, label visibility, and label appearance. Applies to 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the cutplane to modify.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the plot in which the cutplane is located.

parameters.name: -at
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the position of an axis-aligned (-at type) cutplane.

parameters.name: -normal
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the normal vector {X Y Z} of a free-type cutplane. Use together with -origin.

parameters.name: -origin
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the origin point {X Y Z} of a free-type cutplane. Use together with -normal.

parameters.name: -label_position
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the label position. Values: 0, 1, or 2, indicating different corners of the cutplane.

parameters.name: -label_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the label size of the cutplane.

parameters.name: -show_label
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the label of the cutplane.

parameters.name: -hide_label
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the label of the cutplane.

get_cutplane_prop.description: Returns the specified property of a cutplane. Returns only one property at a time. Applies to 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the cutplane from which the property is returned.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the plot in which the cutplane is located.

parameters.name: -at
parameters.desc: Returns the position value of an axis-aligned (-at type) cutplane.

parameters.name: -hide_label
parameters.desc: Returns whether the label of the cutplane is hidden.

parameters.name: -label_position
parameters.desc: Returns the position of the label.

parameters.name: -label_size
parameters.desc: Returns the size of the label.

parameters.name: -normal
parameters.desc: Returns the normal vector of a free-type cutplane.

parameters.name: -origin
parameters.desc: Returns the origin vector of a free-type cutplane.

parameters.name: -show_label
parameters.desc: Returns the visibility status of the label.

set_cutline_prop.signature: set_cutline_prop <stringValue> -plot <stringValue> [-handles_color <#rrggbb>] [-label_normal | -label_op] [-label_pos 0 | 1] [-label_size <doubleValue>] [-line_color <#rrggbb>] [-line_style solid | dot | dash | dashdot | dashdotdot] [-line_width <intValue>] [-pos1 {<x> <y> [<z>]}] [-pos2 {<x> <y> [<z>]}] [-showhandles | -hidehandles] [-show_label | -hide_label]
set_cutline_prop.description: Changes the properties of a cutline, including its position, line appearance, label visibility, and handle display. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the cutline to modify.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the plot in which the cutline is located.

parameters.name: -handles_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the color of the handles in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -label_normal
parameters.desc: Optional. Places the label on the normal side of the cutline endpoint.

parameters.name: -label_op
parameters.desc: Optional. Places the label on the opposite side of the cutline endpoint.

parameters.name: -label_pos
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the label position. Values: 0 or 1, indicating which edge of the cutline.

parameters.name: -label_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the label size of the cutline.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the color of the cutline in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the style of the cutline: "solid" (continuous line), "dot" (dotted line), "dash" (dashed line), "dashdot" (alternating dash and dot), "dashdotdot" (alternating dash and two dots).

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the width of the cutline in pixels.

parameters.name: -pos1
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the position of the first point of the cutline as {x y [z]}.

parameters.name: -pos2
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the position of the second point of the cutline as {x y [z]}.

parameters.name: -showhandles
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the handles of the cutline.

parameters.name: -hidehandles
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the handles of the cutline.

parameters.name: -show_label
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the label of the cutline.

parameters.name: -hide_label
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the label of the cutline.

get_cutline_prop.description: Returns the specified property of a cutline. Returns only one property at a time. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the cutline from which the property is returned.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the plot in which the cutline is located.

parameters.name: -handles_color
parameters.desc: Returns the color of the handles.

parameters.name: -hidehandles
parameters.desc: Returns whether the handles are hidden.

parameters.name: -label_op
parameters.desc: Returns the side of the label display: false (0) for normal position, true (1) for opposite position.

parameters.name: -label_pos
parameters.desc: Returns the position of the label.

parameters.name: -label_size
parameters.desc: Returns the size of the label.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Returns the color of the line.

parameters.name: -line_style
parameters.desc: Returns the style of the line.

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Returns the width of the line.

parameters.name: -pos1
parameters.desc: Returns the position of the first point.

parameters.name: -pos2
parameters.desc: Returns the position of the second point.

parameters.name: -showhandles
parameters.desc: Returns the visibility status of the handles.

parameters.name: -show_label
parameters.desc: Returns the visibility status of the label.

create_field.description: Creates a new field by evaluating a mathematical function on data from a 2D or 3D plot or dataset. If -plot or -dataset is not specified, the selected dataset is used. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -function
parameters.desc: Required. Specifies the mathematical expression to evaluate. Supports standard operations and field references. See Appendix D of the manual for a complete list of operations.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the new field to create.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset from which the field is created.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which the field is created.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the geometry in the plot. Can only be used with -plot. Defaults to the first geometry.

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Optional. Immediately shows the newly created field if specified.

create_surface.description: Creates a new 3D dataset using a 2D dataset or geometry as source, or modifies an existing 3D surface dataset. The surface is generated by extruding a field's values along a coordinate axis. Applies to 2D datasets (or plots) and 3D surface datasets (or plots) only.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the dataset to be used to build the surface dataset.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the plot from which to retrieve the geometry. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the geometry in the plot. Defaults to the first geometry.

parameters.name: -factor
parameters.desc: Optional. Multiplier applied to the coordinate to generate the surface. Default is 1.

parameters.name: -field
parameters.desc: Optional. Selects the field on which the surface is based. Defaults to the current contour band field displayed in the plot.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the surface dataset to be created.

parameters.name: -range
parameters.desc: Optional. Pair of values {min max} that limits the range of coordinate values used to generate the surface.

parameters.name: -scale
parameters.desc: Optional. Scale applied to the coordinates: "linear" (default, no transformation), "logabs" (logarithm of absolute values), "asinh" (inverse hyperbolic sine, suitable for signed data spanning zero).

create_iso.description: Creates a new iso-geometry using an isovalue from the field of a geometry, or modifies an existing iso-geometry by changing its isovalue or color. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -field
parameters.desc: Optional. Selects the field on which the isovalue is applied. Defaults to the current contour band field displayed in the plot.

parameters.name: -value
parameters.desc: Required. Specifies the isovalue with which to create or modify the iso-geometry.

parameters.name: -color
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the color for the iso-geometry in #rrggbb format. Default is gray.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the geometry in the plot (defaults to the first geometry). If -modify is specified, this is the name of the iso-geometry to modify.

parameters.name: -modify
parameters.desc: Optional. Modifies the existing iso-geometry defined by -geom instead of creating a new one. Mutually exclusive with -name.

parameters.name: -name
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the new iso-geometry to be created. Mutually exclusive with -modify.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot from which to retrieve the geometry. Defaults to the selected plot.

list_fields.description: Returns a list of field names. Supports filtering by search pattern, dataset, geometry, plot, and contour band visibility. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter field names.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches fields in the specified dataset.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches fields in the specified geometry.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches fields in the specified plot.

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows contour bands of matching fields.

parameters.name: -hide
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides contour bands of matching fields.

parameters.name: -show_bands
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters to return only fields with contour bands shown.

parameters.name: -hide_bands
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters to return only fields with contour bands hidden.

list_regions.description: Returns a list of region names. Supports filtering by search pattern, dataset, geometry, plot, material, visibility state, and individual display properties. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter region names.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns regions of the specified dataset.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns regions of the specified geometry.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns regions of the specified plot.

parameters.name: -material
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns regions present in the specified material.

parameters.name: -parts
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns a list of regions that have parts.

parameters.name: -show_all
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions that are completely shown.

parameters.name: -hide_all
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions that are completely hidden.

parameters.name: -show_border
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their border shown.

parameters.name: -hide_border
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their border hidden.

parameters.name: -show_bulk
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their bulk shown.

parameters.name: -hide_bulk
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their bulk hidden.

parameters.name: -show_field
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their field shown.

parameters.name: -hide_field
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their field hidden.

parameters.name: -show_mesh
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their mesh shown.

parameters.name: -hide_mesh
parameters.desc: Optional. Filters by regions with their mesh hidden.

list_materials.description: Returns a list of material names. Supports filtering by search pattern, dataset, geometry, plot, and individual display properties. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Search pattern to filter material names.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches materials in the specified dataset.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches materials in the specified geometry.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Searches materials in the specified plot.

parameters.name: -show_all
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows all properties of matching materials.

parameters.name: -hide_all
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides all properties of matching materials.

parameters.name: -show_border
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows borders of matching materials.

parameters.name: -hide_border
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides borders of matching materials.

parameters.name: -show_bulk
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows bulk of matching materials.

parameters.name: -hide_bulk
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides bulk of matching materials.

parameters.name: -show_field
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows scalar fields of matching materials.

parameters.name: -hide_field
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides scalar fields of matching materials.

parameters.name: -show_mesh
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows mesh of matching materials.

parameters.name: -hide_mesh
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides mesh of matching materials.

set_field_prop.description: Sets display properties for a scalar field on 2D and 3D plots, including contour levels, color range, scale, line style, and visibility. If the field name is not specified, properties are set for the selected field. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the field. If not specified, the selected field is used.

parameters.name: -contour_labels_on
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows contour labels of the selected field.

parameters.name: -contour_labels_off
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides contour labels of the selected field.

parameters.name: -custom_levels
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies a custom list of contour level values. Mutually exclusive with -scale/-levels.

parameters.name: -scale
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the contour scale: "linear" (default, uniform spacing), "log" (logarithmic spacing), "asinh" (inverse hyperbolic sine, handles signed data), "logabs" (logarithm of absolute values). Must be used with -levels.

parameters.name: -levels
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of contour levels. Must be used with -scale. Do not use with -custom_levels.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset or geometry. Defaults to the main one from the active plot.

parameters.name: -interpolated_values
parameters.desc: Optional. Uses interpolated values on vertices for visualization (valid for fields defined on cells only).

parameters.name: -primary_values
parameters.desc: Optional. Uses primary cell values for visualization (valid for fields defined on cells only).

parameters.name: -label
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the label of the selected field.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the color of the contour lines.

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the width of the contour lines in pixels.

parameters.name: -max
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the maximum value of the field color range.

parameters.name: -max_auto
parameters.desc: Optional. Automatically adjusts the maximum value when field data changes.

parameters.name: -max_fixed
parameters.desc: Optional. Fixes the maximum value so it does not update when field data changes (e.g., when plots are linked).

parameters.name: -min
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the minimum value of the field color range.

parameters.name: -min_auto
parameters.desc: Optional. Automatically adjusts the minimum value when field data changes.

parameters.name: -min_fixed
parameters.desc: Optional. Fixes the minimum value so it does not update when field data changes.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -range
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the field contour range as {min max}. Mutually exclusive with -reset.

parameters.name: -reset
parameters.desc: Optional. Resets the field range to its default values.

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the contour plot of the field.

parameters.name: -hide
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the contour plot of the field.

parameters.name: -show_bands
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows contour bands.

parameters.name: -hide_bands
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides contour bands.

get_field_prop.description: Returns the specified property of a field. Returns only one property at a time. If the field name is not specified, the active field is used. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringValue>
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the field. If not specified, the active field is used.

parameters.name: -contour_labels_on
parameters.desc: Returns whether contour labels are shown for the field.

parameters.name: -custom_levels
parameters.desc: Returns the custom levels defined for the field.

parameters.name: -interpolated_values
parameters.desc: Returns whether interpolated vertex values are used for visualization (valid for cell-defined fields only).

parameters.name: -label
parameters.desc: Returns the label of the field.

parameters.name: -levels
parameters.desc: Returns the contour levels of the field.

parameters.name: -line_color
parameters.desc: Returns the color of the contour lines.

parameters.name: -line_width
parameters.desc: Returns the width of the contour lines.

parameters.name: -max
parameters.desc: Returns the maximum value of the field.

parameters.name: -max_fixed
parameters.desc: Returns whether the maximum value is fixed.

parameters.name: -min
parameters.desc: Returns the minimum value of the field.

parameters.name: -min_fixed
parameters.desc: Returns whether the minimum value is fixed.

parameters.name: -range
parameters.desc: Returns the range {min max} of the field.

parameters.name: -scale
parameters.desc: Returns the scale of the field.

parameters.name: -show
parameters.desc: Returns whether the field is shown on the plot.

parameters.name: -show_bands
parameters.desc: Returns whether contour bands are shown.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset or geometry. Defaults to the main one from the active plot.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. Defaults to the active plot.

set_region_prop.description: Sets display properties for one or more regions, including colors, visibility, mesh, field, and translucency. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: Required. List of region names on which to apply the properties.

parameters.name: -border_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the border color of the regions in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -border_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the border width in pixels. Default is 1, with exceptions: depletion regions/overlays default to 2, junction lines to 3, contacts/interfaces to 2 (2D) or 3 (3D).

parameters.name: -color
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the bulk color of the regions in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset or geometry. Defaults to the main one from the active plot.

parameters.name: -mesh_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the mesh color of the regions in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -mesh_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the mesh width in pixels. Default is 1, except interface regions default to 2.

parameters.name: -on
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the region.

parameters.name: -off
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the region.

parameters.name: -particles_size

set_material_prop.description: Sets display properties for one or more materials, including colors, visibility, mesh, field, and translucency. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: <stringList>
parameters.desc: Required. List of material names on which to apply the properties.

parameters.name: -border_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the border color of the materials in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -border_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the border width in pixels. Default is 1, with exceptions: depletion regions/overlays default to 2, junction lines to 3, contacts/interfaces to 2 (2D) or 3 (3D).

parameters.name: -color
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the bulk color of the materials in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset or geometry. Defaults to the main one from the active plot.

parameters.name: -mesh_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the mesh color of the materials in #rrggbb format.

parameters.name: -mesh_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the mesh width in pixels. Default is 1, except interface regions default to 2.

parameters.name: -on
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the material.

parameters.name: -off
parameters.desc: Optional. Hides the material.

parameters.name: -particles_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the size of particles in particle (kinetic Monte Carlo) materials.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -show_all
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows all display properties of the materials (bulk, border, mesh, field, vector).

parameters.name: -hide_all

parameters.name: -hide_border

parameters.name: -hide_mesh

parameters.name: -show_vector
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows the vector field visualization on the materials.

parameters.name: -hide_vector

parameters.name: -translucency_level

parameters.name: -translucency_off

parameters.name: -mesh_color

probe_field.description: Probes a point on a 2D or 3D plot and returns the field value at that location. For xy plots, use probe_curve instead. The field value can be read at a specific coordinate or at a vertex ID within a region.

parameters.name: -coord
parameters.desc: Required (use with -point/-region). Specifies the point to probe as {x y [z]}. In 2D plots, z must be 0 or omitted.

parameters.name: -point
parameters.desc: Required (use with -coord). Specifies the vertex ID relative to the region. Must be used with -region.

parameters.name: -region
parameters.desc: Required when -point is specified. Specifies the region where the field will be probed.

parameters.name: -field
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the field to probe. Defaults to the active field.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the geometry to probe.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to probe. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -position
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns a vector with the coordinates of the probe point instead of the field value.

parameters.name: -snap
parameters.desc: Optional. Snaps the probe to the closest mesh node. When used with -position, returns the coordinates of the closest node.

integrate_field.description: Integrates a scalar field over a complete 2D or 3D plot, or in specific regions, materials, or a user-defined window. Supports polyline-defined polyhedron domains via -points/-type. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -bottom
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the lower bound of the polyhedron domain in the extrusion axis.

parameters.name: -top
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the upper bound of the polyhedron domain in the extrusion axis.

parameters.name: -dataset
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the dataset. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -field
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the field to integrate. Defaults to the active field.

parameters.name: -geom
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the name of the dataset.

parameters.name: -materials
parameters.desc: Optional. Limits the integration to the specified materials.

parameters.name: -regions
parameters.desc: Optional. Limits the integration to the specified regions.

parameters.name: -points
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the vertices for a polyline to be extruded along the -type axis to create a polyhedron domain, defined as {{x0 y0 z0} {x1 y1 z1} ...}.

parameters.name: -returndomain
parameters.desc: Optional. Returns the integrated domain value (volume in 3D, surface area in 2D) instead of the integral.

parameters.name: -type
parameters.desc: Optional. Selects the extrusion axis ("x", "y", or "z") for the polyline defined by -points.

parameters.name: -window
parameters.desc: Optional. Defines a bounding box {xmin ymin [zmin] xmax ymax [zmax]} within which to integrate. For 2D plots with x/z axes, use {xmin zmin xmax zmax}. For y/z axes, use {ymin zmin ymax zmax}.

set_value_blanking.description: Sets value blanking rules to hide field values outside a specified range. Supports up to 8 constraints combined with union or intersection logic. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -field
parameters.desc: Required. Name of the field on which to apply blanking. Defaults to the selected field.

parameters.name: -less
parameters.desc: Optional. Blanks all field values less than the specified threshold.

parameters.name: -greater
parameters.desc: Optional. Blanks all field values greater than the specified threshold.

parameters.name: -reset
parameters.desc: Optional. Removes all value blanking rules for the field.

parameters.name: -blank
parameters.desc: Optional. Selects the blanking evaluation mode: "all" (blank if all vertices of a cell meet the condition, default), "any" (blank if any vertex meets the condition), "inter" (interpolate vertex values for display).

parameters.name: -cons
parameters.desc: Optional. Constraint slot number (1 to 8) for multiple blanking rules. Default is 1.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. Defaults to the selected plot.

parameters.name: -union
parameters.desc: Optional. Combines multiple constraints with OR logic (default).

parameters.name: -intersection
parameters.desc: Optional. Combines multiple constraints with AND logic.

set_axis_prop.signature: set_axis_prop [-axis x|y|z|y2] [-anchor <doubleValue>] [-auto_padding|-manual_padding] [-auto_precision|-manual_precision] [-auto_spacing|-manual_spacing] [-inverted|-not_inverted] [-label_angle <doubleValue>] [-label_font_att normal|bold|italic|underline|strikeout] [-label_font_color <#rrggbb>] [-label_font_factor <doubleValue>] [-label_font_family arial|courier|times] [-label_font_size <intValue>] [-label_format preferred|scientific|engineering|fixed] [-label_padding <intValue>] [-label_precision <intValue>] [-major_ticks_length <intValue>] [-major_ticks_width <intValue>] [-max <doubleValue>] [-max_auto|-max_fixed] [-min <doubleValue>] [-min_auto|-min_fixed] [-minor_ticks_length <intValue>] [-minor_ticks_position center|in|out] [-minor_ticks_width <intValue>] [-nof_minor_ticks <intValue>] [-padding <intValue>] [-plot <stringValue>] [-range {<x1> <x2>}] [-reset] [-show|-hide] [-show_minor_ticks|-hide_minor_ticks] [-show_label|-hide_label] [-show_ticks|-hide_ticks] [-show_title|-hide_title] [-spacing <doubleValue>] [-ticks_position out|in|center] [-title <stringValue>] [-title_font_att normal|bold|italic|underline|strikeout] [-title_font_color <#rrggbb>] [-title_font_factor <doubleValue>] [-title_font_family arial|courier|times] [-title_font_size <intValue>] [-type linear|log]
set_axis_prop.description: Sets axis properties such as scale type, range, labels, ticks, and font attributes. If -axis is not specified, properties are applied to all axes. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: -axis
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the axis to modify: x, y, z, or y2 (y2 is valid for xy plots only). If not specified, the command applies to all axes.

parameters.name: -type
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the axis scale type: "linear" (linear scale) or "log" (logarithmic scale). Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -title
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the axis label text displayed as the axis title.

parameters.name: -range
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the axis range as {min max}.

parameters.name: -min
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the minimum value of the axis.

parameters.name: -max
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the maximum value of the axis.

parameters.name: -min_auto|-min_fixed
parameters.desc: Optional. "-min_auto" lets the minimum auto-adjust with data changes; "-min_fixed" locks the minimum to a user-defined value so data changes do not update the range. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -max_auto|-max_fixed
parameters.desc: Optional. "-max_auto" lets the maximum auto-adjust with data changes; "-max_fixed" locks the maximum to a user-defined value so data changes do not update the range. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -inverted|-not_inverted
parameters.desc: Optional. Inverts or restores the axis direction.

parameters.name: -show|-hide
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows or hides the axis.

parameters.name: -show_ticks|-hide_ticks
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows or hides the major ticks.

parameters.name: -show_minor_ticks|-hide_minor_ticks
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows or hides the minor ticks. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -show_label|-hide_label
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows or hides the tick value labels.

parameters.name: -show_title|-hide_title
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows or hides the axis title.

parameters.name: -spacing
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the spacing between major ticks.

parameters.name: -ticks_position
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the position of major ticks: "out" (outside the axis), "in" (inside the axis), or "center" (centered on the axis).

parameters.name: -nof_minor_ticks
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the number of minor ticks between major ticks.

parameters.name: -label_format
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the numeric format of tick labels: "preferred" (auto-select best format), "scientific" (exponential notation), "engineering" (SI prefix notation), or "fixed" (fixed-point notation).

parameters.name: -label_precision
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the number of decimal digits for tick labels.

parameters.name: -label_font_att
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font attribute of tick labels: normal, bold, italic, underline, or strikeout.

parameters.name: -label_font_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the color of tick labels in #rrggbb hex format.

parameters.name: -label_font_factor
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font size multiplier for tick labels. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -label_font_family
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font family for tick labels: "arial", "courier", or "times".

parameters.name: -label_font_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font size of tick labels in points. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -label_angle
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the rotation angle of tick labels in degrees, between -90 and 90. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -title_font_att
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font attribute of the axis title: normal, bold, italic, underline, or strikeout.

parameters.name: -title_font_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the color of the axis title in #rrggbb hex format.

parameters.name: -title_font_factor
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font size multiplier for the axis title. Applies to 2D and 3D plots only.

parameters.name: -title_font_family
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font family for the axis title: "arial", "courier", or "times".

parameters.name: -title_font_size
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the font size of the axis title in points. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -anchor
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the anchor point from which tick values are computed.

parameters.name: -auto_padding|-manual_padding
parameters.desc: Optional. "-auto_padding" enables automatic axis padding; "-manual_padding" uses manual padding values. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -padding
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the axis padding in pixels. Has no effect when -auto_padding is specified. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -major_ticks_length
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the length of major ticks in pixels.

parameters.name: -major_ticks_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the width of major ticks in pixels. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -minor_ticks_length
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the length of minor ticks in pixels.

parameters.name: -minor_ticks_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the width of minor ticks in pixels. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -minor_ticks_position
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the position of minor ticks: "center", "in", or "out". Applies to 2D plots only.

parameters.name: -reset
parameters.desc: Optional. Resets axis parameters to default values. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to modify. If not specified, uses the selected plot.

get_axis_prop.description: Returns a single axis property at a time for the specified axis. The y2 axis identifier is valid only for xy plots.

parameters.name: -max

parameters.name: -nof_minor_ticks

parameters.name: -label_format
parameters.desc: Returns the numeric format of tick labels.

parameters.name: -label_precision
parameters.desc: Returns the precision of tick labels.

parameters.name: -label_font_att
parameters.desc: Returns the font attribute of tick labels.

parameters.name: -label_font_color
parameters.desc: Returns the color of tick labels.

parameters.name: -label_font_factor
parameters.desc: Returns the font size factor of tick labels.

parameters.name: -label_font_family
parameters.desc: Returns the font family of tick labels.

parameters.name: -label_font_size
parameters.desc: Returns the font size of tick labels in points.

parameters.name: -label_angle
parameters.desc: Returns the rotation angle of tick labels in degrees.

parameters.name: -title_font_att
parameters.desc: Returns the font attribute of the axis title.

parameters.name: -title_font_color
parameters.desc: Returns the color of the axis title.

parameters.name: -title_font_factor
parameters.desc: Returns the font size factor of the axis title.

parameters.name: -title_font_family
parameters.desc: Returns the font family of the axis title.

parameters.name: -title_font_size
parameters.desc: Returns the font size of the axis title in points.

parameters.name: -anchor
parameters.desc: Returns the anchor point from which ticks are computed.

parameters.name: -auto_padding
parameters.desc: Returns whether automatic padding is active. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -auto_precision
parameters.desc: Returns whether automatic precision is active.

parameters.name: -auto_spacing
parameters.desc: Returns whether automatic tick spacing is used.

parameters.name: -padding
parameters.desc: Returns the axis padding value in pixels. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -major_ticks_length
parameters.desc: Returns the length of major ticks.

parameters.name: -major_ticks_width
parameters.desc: Returns the width of major ticks. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -minor_ticks_length
parameters.desc: Returns the length of minor ticks.

parameters.name: -minor_ticks_position
parameters.desc: Returns the position of minor ticks: "in", "out", or "center". Applies to 2D plots only.

parameters.name: -minor_ticks_width
parameters.desc: Returns the width of minor ticks. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot. If not specified, uses the selected plot.

set_grid_prop.description: Sets grid properties for major and minor grid lines, including color, style, width, and visibility. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: -align
parameters.desc: Optional. Aligns the grid to the left or right edge of the plot. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -line1_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the color of the major grid lines in #rrggbb hex format.

parameters.name: -line1_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the style of the major grid lines: "solid" (continuous line), "dot" (dotted line), "dash" (dashed line), "dashdot" (alternating dash and dot), or "dashdotdot" (alternating dash and two dots). Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -line1_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the width of the major grid lines in pixels.

parameters.name: -line2_color
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the color of the minor grid lines in #rrggbb hex format.

parameters.name: -line2_style
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the style of the minor grid lines: "solid", "dot", "dash", "dashdot", or "dashdotdot". Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -line2_width
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the width of the minor grid lines in pixels.

parameters.name: -show|-hide
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows or hides the major grid lines.

parameters.name: -show_minor_lines|-hide_minor_lines
parameters.desc: Optional. Shows or hides the minor grid lines.

parameters.name: -reset
parameters.desc: Optional. Resets grid properties to default values. Applies to xy plots only.

parameters.name: -plot
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the plot to modify. If not specified, uses the selected plot.

get_grid_prop.description: Returns a single grid property at a time. Applies to xy and 2D plots only.

parameters.name: -line1_color

parameters.name: -line2_color
parameters.desc: Returns the color of the minor grid lines.

parameters.name: -line2_style

parameters.name: -line2_width

parameters.name: -show

parameters.name: -show_minor_lines
